activities.title: Multi-agent orchestration for Orqys
activities.description: Wiring up the DAG-based workflow engine to support parallel agent execution. Context and planning agents can now run concurrently.

activities.title: LLM validation loop patterns
activities.description: Exploring self-correcting generation loops where the review agent can reject and trigger re-generation with refined constraints.

activities.title: Wispr Flow v2 — streaming rewrite
activities.description: Shipped streaming transcription mode. Audio chunks are now processed as they arrive instead of waiting for silence detection. Sub-300ms latency.

activities.title: Portfolio OS knowledge graph
activities.description: Rebuilt the D3 force graph with proper link validation. Dangling references no longer crash the simulation.

activities.title: Apple MLX inference optimizations
activities.description: INT4 quantization on MLX gives 3x speedup over FP16 with negligible quality loss for rewriting tasks. Unified memory is the key advantage.

activities.title: Synapse relevance scoring v2
activities.description: Composite scoring now weights interaction recency and relationship strength alongside semantic similarity. Much better results for 'who do I know' queries.

activities.title: dbt pipeline recovery at Absinthe
activities.description: Fixed cascading pipeline failures across campaign event data. Root cause: schema drift in upstream ingestion affecting millions of rows.

activities.title: MCP protocol deep dive
activities.description: Model Context Protocol is the right abstraction for agent-tool integration. Much cleaner than custom function calling implementations.

activities.title: Infra cost optimization shipped
activities.description: Production deployment architecture redesign complete. $300/day → $500/month. Containerization + compute right-sizing did most of the work.

activities.title: Identity verification system
activities.description: Building reputation-based verification using non-transferable NFTs. The interesting part is the scoring model for trust signals.

activities.title: Bloom reaches 1200 users
activities.description: Platform crossed 1,200 active users across 50+ apprenticeship programs. Onboarding completion rate holding at 70% after the last redesign.

activities.title: Kafka pipeline at IG Group
activities.description: Distributed event processing pipeline live. 10k+ events/day with zero dropped messages. The cloud↔on-prem sync was the hardest part.
